title: LLMs: Don't use a sledgehammer when tweezers will do
abstract: LLMs: Don't use a sledgehammer when tweezers will do delivers solid reasoning and generation capabilities through a straightforward API. It is not another ChatGPT wrapper — the architecture has real d...
abstract_zh: 伙计们，别再用大锤拧螺丝了！试试 **LLMs: Don't use a sledgehammer when tweezers will do** 吧。它专治各种“大材小用”症，尤其在写周报或调Bug时，能让你的效率嗖嗖提升！轻巧精准，就是这么牛！
